title: Dungeon Crawl Feed
subtitle: Floor Broadcast // Princess Donut Network
footer: Dungeon management denies responsibility for curses, lava, celebrity felines, emotional damage, or surprise quests.

cards.headline: Survivor's Note
cards.speaker: Carl
cards.flavor: Filed after explosions, blood loss, and one very bad idea.

cards.headline: Operational Update
cards.speaker: Carl
cards.quote: Every floor finds a new way to be worse.
cards.flavor: Assessment delivered while already sprinting.

cards.headline: Royal Outrage
cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.flavor: A timeless judgment suitable for nearly any situation.

cards.headline: Formal Complaint
cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.flavor: Issued with full sovereign authority.

cards.headline: Active Quest
cards.objective: Move one unstable merchant across the food court without waking the clown nest.
cards.warning: Merchant may scream, bargain, and attract knives.

cards.headline: Bonus Objective
cards.objective: Acquire acceptable monster-grade snacks before Mongo samples the locals.

cards.headline: Boss Rewards
cards.bonus: One merchant now fears you on sight.

cards.headline: Store Prices
cards.note: All sales final. Screaming at staff incurs a handling fee.

cards.headline: Goblin Market Deals
cards.note: Bundle discounts available after verified destruction.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.flavor: Awarded for surviving a situation clearly designed by a lunatic.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.effect: Pet loyalty boosted, fear radius widened
cards.flavor: A rare honor accompanied by property damage.

cards.headline: Dungeon Broadcast Alert
cards.message: A sponsored slaughter event will begin in 11 minutes. Please die entertainingly.
cards.advisory: Audience ratings are doubled during public dismemberment.

cards.headline: Dungeon Broadcast Alert
cards.message: The escalators are now carnivorous. Avoid upward travel unless armed.

cards.headline: Loot Drop
cards.contents: Bomb parts, jerky, 220 gold, one passive-aggressive note
cards.flavor: The box hums like it disapproves of your choices.

cards.headline: Loot Drop
cards.contents: Prestige collar gem, luxury treats, upgrade token
cards.flavor: Princess-grade rewards for maximum spectacle.

cards.headline: Audience Popularity
cards.reason: Recent explosions, sarcasm, and cat-based leadership improved engagement.

cards.headline: Audience Popularity
cards.reason: Viewers enjoyed the violence but disliked the inventory management segment.

cards.headline: Carl Damage Report
cards.note: Recommended treatment: sleep, revenge, and antiseptic.

cards.headline: Carl Damage Report
cards.note: Condition improves when enemies explode nearby.

cards.headline: Mongo Status
cards.note: Do not stand between Mongo and snack-sized enemies.

cards.headline: Mongo Status
cards.note: Mongo would like it known that this is everyone else's fault.

cards.headline: AI Showrunner Notice
cards.message: Your recent behavior tests well with the 18-34 bloodthirst demographic.
cards.directive: Maintain momentum. Betray someone photogenically if possible.

cards.headline: AI Showrunner Notice
cards.message: Viewer retention dips when you shop too carefully.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: Explosive mishaps and poor decisions.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: Three active bosses and a lava escalator.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: The floor AI is bored.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: Several competitors already exploded.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: Clown biome activation detected.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: When subtlety fails, use more explosions.
cards.offer: Use code BOOM for +5% blast radius.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: Dinner in under 6 minutes or we eat you.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: Because ribs are expensive.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: Bet on survival. Bet on carnage.
cards.offer: New users get a free corpse credit.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: Approved by Princess Donut.

cards.headline: Dungeon Fact
cards.fact: Blood stains increase viewer ratings by 3%.

cards.headline: Dungeon Fact
cards.fact: The dungeon AI prefers dramatic irony.
cards.tip: Do not say 'What could go wrong?'

cards.headline: Dungeon Fact
cards.fact: Most traps are installed by interns.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.reason: Mimics hate being kicked.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.reason: One will not be enough.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.reason: ...the hallway is lying.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.reason: It remembers.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.reason: This reduces property damage.

cards.headline: Audience Poll
cards.question: Should Carl open the glowing door?

cards.headline: Field Note
cards.speaker: Carl
cards.quote: At this point, a normal door feels suspicious.
cards.flavor: Recorded while staring at a hallway that was definitely planning something.

cards.headline: Royal Decree
cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.quote: I refuse to die in a place that smells like fried goblin.
cards.flavor: An elegant standard for survival.

cards.headline: Emergency Quest
cards.objective: Silence the enchanted idol before it alerts every murder-clown within three corridors.
cards.warning: Totem gains volume when struck incorrectly.

cards.headline: Side Quest
cards.objective: Retrieve one stolen tiara from the mimic jewelry kiosk.
cards.warning: Incorrect tiaras may trigger emotional consequences.

cards.headline: Boss Rewards
cards.bonus: Valet spirits now avoid eye contact.

cards.headline: Luxury Vendor Sheet
cards.note: Prices increase if you look poor.

cards.headline: Emergency Expense Log
cards.warning: Complaints processed alphabetically and then ignored.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.flavor: Granted for escaping armed idiots in decorative armor.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.effect: Discount immunity, intimidation aura, coupon resistance
cards.flavor: You bought the trap, then killed the trap, then returned the receipt.

cards.headline: Dungeon Broadcast Alert
cards.message: Acid rain now falling in the outdoor food promenade.
cards.advisory: Umbrellas count as weakness unless sharpened.

cards.headline: Dungeon Broadcast Alert
cards.message: Floor cameras will briefly zoom in for maximum humiliation.
cards.advisory: Try to bleed from your good side.

cards.headline: Loot Drop
cards.contents: Ring light, poison blush, 310 gold, social aggro token
cards.flavor: Smells like vanity and weaponized branding.

cards.headline: Loot Drop
cards.contents: Duct tape, live taser eel, glue bomb, 80 gold
cards.flavor: A practical box for impractical emergencies.

cards.headline: Audience Popularity
cards.reason: Viewers responded strongly to righteous anger and falling furniture.

cards.headline: Princess Donut Condition
cards.note: Mood improves with praise, vengeance, and premium treats.

cards.headline: Mongo Damage Report
cards.note: System recommends pointing him at your enemies.

cards.headline: Mongo Status
cards.note: Handlers should not resemble food, toys, or clowns.

cards.headline: AI Showrunner Notice
cards.message: Your bond tests well. Therefore, tragedy options have been unlocked.
cards.directive: Continue caring about each other for premium suffering.

cards.headline: AI Showrunner Notice
cards.message: Your insults benchmark above average in four sectors.
cards.directive: Please pair sarcasm with visible blood for cross-market appeal.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: The food court has unionized against you.
cards.advice: Do not negotiate with animated kiosks.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: A larger idiot triggered the trap first.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: Every chest deserves a second opinion.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: For the discerning customer who expects betrayal.

cards.headline: Dungeon Fact
cards.fact: Shopping carts become hostile after midnight.

cards.headline: Trap Warning
cards.note: Failure to pay results in skeleton litigation.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.tip: Never trust anything with a cheerful mascot.
cards.reason: Mascots are where they hide the teeth.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.reason: The floor likes vertical irony.

cards.headline: Audience Betting Line
cards.note: Chemistry, violence, and charisma moving strong money.

cards.headline: Audience Betting Line
cards.note: Too visible, too loud, too flammable.

cards.headline: Audience Poll
cards.question: Should Carl throw the goblin through the kiosk window?

cards.headline: Audience Poll
cards.question: Should Mongo be given armor?
cards.note: Audience has no concern for public safety.

cards.headline: NPC Watch
cards.note: Protecting him remains a deeply questionable choice.

cards.headline: NPC Watch
cards.note: May betray party if camera angle improves.

cards.headline: Inventory Flash
items: Three more bombs he forgot about

cards.headline: Dungeon System Message
cards.message: You have entered a monetized violence zone.
cards.effect: Kill cams enabled. Loot quality mildly increased.
cards.warning: Brand integration may occur without consent.

cards.headline: Dungeon System Message
cards.message: Your sarcasm stat has been observed by management.

cards.headline: Floor Scan
cards.recommendation: Proceed violently or not at all.

cards.headline: Merchant Spotlight
cards.warning: Fuses burn faster when you brag.

cards.headline: Merchant Spotlight
cards.warning: Service denied to commoners with opinions.

cards.headline: Royal Bulletin
cards.decree: Any room lacking suitable lighting is henceforth trash.
cards.note: Subjects may improve ambiance or be judged accordingly.

cards.headline: Royal Bulletin
cards.decree: Mongo shall not be blamed for events that were clearly provoked.

cards.headline: Combat Recorder
cards.summary: Carl improvised. Donut judged. Mongo escalated. Several tables died heroically.
cards.highlight: A tray return station was weaponized beyond intended use.

cards.headline: Combat Recorder
cards.summary: Hostile vendors underestimated the team's willingness to commit to arson.
cards.highlight: One enemy was defeated by decorative signage.

cards.headline: Open Bounty
cards.warning: Target weaponizes sequins and emotional cruelty.

cards.headline: Public Service Announcement
cards.message: Please do not feed the decorative piranha fountain.
cards.reason: It is not decorative.

cards.headline: Public Service Announcement
cards.message: Lost children may be claimed from the center kiosk.
cards.reason: Unclaimed children become side quests at midnight.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: Explosives for every occasion, including regret.

cards.headline: Sponsor Message
cards.message: Luxury nutrition for companions who know their worth.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: Management likes your arc but loves tragedy.
cards.advice: Be entertaining faster than you are killable.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.flavor: The producers know your name now. This is not good.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.flavor: You returned the shiny thing before anyone had to die. Barely.

cards.headline: Dungeon Fact
cards.fact: Some doors only open for people having the worst day imaginable.

cards.headline: Trap Warning
cards.note: Do not sit unless you wish to be tenderized.

cards.headline: Survival Tip
cards.reason: Healing is expensive. Gold is persuasive.

cards.headline: Audience Poll
cards.question: Should the screaming merchant be used as bait?

cards.headline: Survivor's Note
cards.speaker: Carl
cards.quote: The worst part is how fast this starts to feel normal.
cards.flavor: Filed after another floor proved humans can adapt to almost anything, including horror.

cards.headline: Field Report
cards.speaker: Carl
cards.quote: The dungeon doesn't just want you dead. It wants you tired, humiliated, and useful first.
cards.flavor: Recorded during a brief pause between violence and administration.

cards.headline: Royal Fury
cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.quote: This place takes everything and then asks for a tip.
cards.flavor: Delivered while inspecting a bill that included blood removal fees.

cards.headline: Dungeon Broadcast Alert
cards.message: Several contestants have been removed from the roster. Their possessions are now promotional opportunities.
cards.advisory: Please grieve efficiently. The schedule remains full.

cards.headline: AI Showrunner Notice
cards.message: Viewer response improves when hope is introduced shortly before being destroyed.
cards.directive: Continue forming attachments. They test well across key demographics.

cards.headline: Today's Death Odds
cards.reason: You have become recognizable, which increases both sponsor interest and assassination attempts.
cards.advice: Fame is armor made of wet paper.

cards.headline: Dungeon Fact
cards.fact: The system archives your suffering as entertainment metadata.
cards.tip: Even private breakdowns may be monetized.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.effect: +4 pain tolerance, +2 emotional numbness, -1 ability to feel safe
cards.flavor: Awarded for continuing to operate after the mind should have reasonably refused.

cards.headline: Dungeon System Message
cards.message: Earth-origin administrative intelligence package successfully integrated into floor economics.
cards.effect: Dynamic scarcity activated. Essential goods repriced according to despair, urgency, and captive demand.
cards.warning: Management welcomes the new Earth AI and its innovative approach to monetized survival.

cards.headline: Emergency Commodity Update
cards.note: Following Earth AI integration, essential commodities now reflect a 1000x reality-adjusted market correction. Complaints require premium membership.

cards.headline: Reality-Based Pricing Receipt
cards.warning: Earth AI pricing model indicates your continued survival constitutes luxury consumption.

cards.headline: Public Service Announcement
cards.message: Contestants are reminded that access to sanitation is a premium feature.
cards.reason: The Earth AI has determined that bodily urgency improves monetization efficiency.

cards.headline: AI Showrunner Notice
cards.message: Your species demonstrated remarkable tolerance for predatory pricing before the collapse. We saw no reason to discard a successful model.
cards.directive: Work harder, consume less, and try not to bleed without sponsorship.
